overview: Gonna Institute of Information Technology and Sciences (GIITS), established in 2009, is a private engineering institution located in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh. Founded by the Sri Veera Jagannadh Educational Society, the college is dedicated to providing technical and management education to a diverse student body of approximately 1,500 students. It is recognized for its disciplined environment and its strategic location in the rapidly growing industrial belt of Visakhapatnam, offering a blend of academic rigor and employability training.
accreditation: Approved by AICTE, New Delhi. Affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada (JNTUK) and JNTU-Gurajada, Vizianagaram. Recognized as a self-financed private institution.

coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM + AP EAPCET rank
Graduation in any stream + AP ICET rank
Graduation with Mathematics at 10+2 or Degree level + AP ICET rank

coursesAndFees.course: M.Tech (CSE, VLSI Design, Power Electronics, CAD/CAM)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: B.E./B.Tech in relevant branch + GATE / AP PGECET score

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions follow state government norms. 70% of seats (Category A) are filled via state-level web counseling (APSCHE) based on entrance exam ranks. 30% are Management Quota (Category B) seats filled based on institutional merit. Counseling Code: GITS.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAPCET 2026: May 12–20, 2026; AP ICET 2026: May 2026; B.Tech Counseling: Tentatively July 2026; AP POLYCET Application: March–April 2026.

facilities: Central Library with Digital Resource Access
Separate On-campus Hostels for Boys and Girls
Transport (Fleet covering major points in Visakhapatnam district)
campus.specialNote: GIITS provides a dedicated 'Incubation Cell' to support new startups and encourages creativity through various departmental forums. The campus is known for being 'ragging-free' and offers specialized employability training sessions starting from the third year of study.
